meta.description: Smell index for Python. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: eval/exec on input
smells.summary: Dynamic code evaluation on untrusted strings.

smells.name: Mutable default argument
smells.summary: Default list or dict shared across calls.

smells.name: Swallowed exception
smells.summary: except: or except Exception: with no reraise/log.

smells.name: Missing type hints
smells.summary: Public function lacks parameter or return annotations.

smells.name: Blocking call in async
smells.summary: time.sleep or requests.get inside async def.

smells.name: Class as function
smells.summary: Thin wrapper class better modelled as dataclass or function.

smells.name: Positive: domain exceptions
smells.summary: Custom exception classes for domain conditions.
